channels.title: Channels
channels.description: YouTube channels to monitor for new videos.

schedule.title: Collection Schedule
schedule.description: Cron expression for how often Stage 1 runs.

channelCooldownDays.title: Channel Cooldown (Days)
channelCooldownDays.description: Minimum days between checks for the same channel.

maxVideosPerChannel.title: Max Videos Per Channel
maxVideosPerChannel.description: Number of most recent videos to fetch per channel check.

maxTranscriptDurationMinutes.title: Max Transcript Duration (Minutes)
maxTranscriptDurationMinutes.description: Skip transcript fetch for videos longer than this.

summaryModel.title: Summary Model
summaryModel.description: LLM model to use for Stage 2 summarization.
